description: Legal documents, drafts or records. In Hebrew. Dating: Late. The year is given on the righthand page, line 8, but is tricky to read. Perhaps 5471 AM, which is 1710/11 CE. David Bibas attests that he has received 250(?) peraḥim from Doña קלדרה(?). The קושלו of קטלאן is mentioned three times, but this is obscure. The document on the left is distinct but probably related (at least also includes David BIbas). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
